name: Lime Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 4 cups thinly sliced limes, halved and seeded (8 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lime slices and water in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered for 45 minutes to an hour or until the peel is very soft.
4. Measure the cooked fruit and liquid into a heatproof measuring cup.
5. For every cup of fruit and liquid, add one cup of sugar.
6. Stir in the food coloring if desired.
7. Bring to a boil and cook to the jelly stage using a candy thermometer (220°F, about 25 minutes). Stir occasionally.
8. Skim off any foam if necessary.
9. Immediately fill hot, sterilized half-pint jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
10. Wipe jar tops and threads clean.
11. Place hot lids on the jars and apply screw bands.
12. Process for 5 minutes in boiling water bath.
Yield: 5 1/2 pints
